entity.summary: Historical centralized cryptocurrency exchange preserved in external exchange registry data.
entity.notes: CoinPaprika preserves BJS as an inactive exchange. A reliable expanded name, first-party domain, jurisdiction, launch date, terminal date, and shutdown cause were not recovered in this review, so HEI preserves only the evidenced registry identity.

evidence.title: BJS exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Entity-specific registry entry preserves the BJS exchange identity and inactive classification.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange registry corpus
evidence.notes: The exchange registry corpus independently preserves BJS as a named exchange record. No expanded name or lifecycle date is inferred from this source.
